<p class="a-paragraph"></p></div><br></div><p></p>

<p class="a-paragraph">There are various Habitats in Pokopia that you can restore using Moves and with items and furniture. Wild Pokemon can appear once you make the Habitat, and you'll be able to befriend them!</p>
<h2 class="a-header--2" id="hl_2">How to Build Habitats</h2><h3 class="a-header--3" id="hm_2">Find Traces of Pokemon</h3>
<p class="a-paragraph"><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Find Traces of Pokemon" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4423638/0fe72e4bb6c840de9c302b1e3cb70e4d.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(px*410/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*410/728);"></p>

<p class="a-paragraph">While exploring the land, you may find <b class="a-bold">traces of Pokemon</b> on the ground. Interact with these tiles and you will <b class="a-bold">get a hint about a Habitat</b>, which will be registered in your <b class="a-bold">Habitat Dex</b>.</p>
<h3 class="a-header--3" id="hm_3">Place Items and Furniture</h3>
<p class="a-paragraph"><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Place Items and Furniture" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4423640/ba7b5f20aed23645887edbce6caab5c8.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(px*410/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*410/728);"></p>

<p class="a-paragraph">Once you get a hint about a Habitat, you can then <b class="a-bold">use Moves</b> and <b class="a-bold">place the required items and furniture</b> to restore a Habitat. You can <b class="a-bold">check which items and furniture</b> are needed in the <b class="a-bold">Habitat Dex</b>.</p>

<p class="a-paragraph">You do not need to follow how the items are arranged in the Habitat's icon, but make sure to <b class="a-bold">place them next to each other</b>.</p>
<h4 class="a-header--4" id="hs_1">Habitat Will Sparkle if Objects are Correct</h4>
<p class="a-paragraph"><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Habitat Sparkle" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4423974/85025c340657b094b0c778f2a33a86a2.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(px*410/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*410/728);"></p>

<p class="a-paragraph">If you follow the requirements properly, <b class="a-bold">a sparkle will appear</b> which signals that you have built a Habitat as needed.</p>

<div id="AdThrive_Content_2_desktop" class="adthrive-ad adthrive-content adthrive-content-1 adthrive-ad-cls" style="min-height: 250px;" data-google-query-id="CP7D5qbbmpMDFUmHfwQdv38EKg"><div id="google_ads_iframe_/18190176,134206022/AdThrive_Content_2/6984faaf65436073a652949b_0__container__" style="border: 0pt none;"><iframe id="google_ads_iframe_/18190176,134206022/AdThrive_Content_2/6984faaf65436073a652949b_0" name="google_ads_iframe_/18190176,134206022/AdThrive_Content_2/6984faaf65436073a652949b_0" title="3rd party ad content" width="1" height="1" scrolling="no" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" frameborder="0" aria-label="Advertisement" tabindex="0" allow="private-state-token-redemption;attribution-reporting" data-load-complete="true" data-google-container-id="4" style="border: 0px; vertical-align: bottom;"></iframe></div></div><p class="a-paragraph">Once a Habitat is built, wild Pokemon can appear from the area and take residence there!</p>
<h2 class="a-header--2" id="hl_3">How to Befriend Pokemon in Habitats</h2><h3 class="a-header--3" id="hm_4">Create Their Habitat</h3>
<p class="a-paragraph"><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Befriending Pokemon" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4423637/2814ef7a05a844f21bcec2a39bd9974d.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(px*410/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*410/728);"></p>

<p class="a-paragraph">Once you make a Habitat, you can <b class="a-bold">interact with the area</b> to make a Pokemon that can appear in the respective Habitat show up. You can then <b class="a-bold">befriend them and make them stay</b>.</p>

<p class="a-paragraph">Pokemon that you befriend may <b class="a-bold">ask for Requests</b>, which are side quests, or <b class="a-bold">teach you Moves</b> that you can use to transform the land and add grass tiles and flowers, destroy stone blocks, cultivate soil, and more!</p>

<p class="a-paragraph"><a class="a-btn" href="/games/Pokemon-Pokopia/archives/578286" style="border-color: ; background-color: ; color: ;"><span>List of All Pokemon</span></a></p>
<h4 class="a-header--4" id="hs_2">Occupied Habitats</h4>
<p class="a-paragraph"><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Existing Habitats" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4424008/49b515aa6b8d3137c56d0d0896466076.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(px*410/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*410/728);"></p>

<p class="a-paragraph">Note that once a Habitat is already occupied, you need to <b class="a-bold">build another one</b> for a new Pokemon to show up, as only one Pokemon can occupy an existing Habitat. Alternatively, you can move the Pokemon currently residing there to a house or <b class="a-bold">any other available habitat</b>.</p>

<p class="a-paragraph"><a class="a-btn" href="/games/Pokemon-Pokopia/archives/585496" style="border-color: ; background-color: ; color: ;"><span>How to Move Houses</span></a></p>
<h4 class="a-header--4" id="hs_3">Weather and Time Will Affect Appearance</h4>
<div id="AdThrive_Content_3_desktop" class="adthrive-ad adthrive-content adthrive-content-1 adthrive-ad-cls" style="min-height: 250px;"></div><p class="a-paragraph"><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Time and Weather" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4423988/f21e9e4fee59f2b63d483ae9e0b69c02.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(px*410/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*410/728);"></p>

<p class="a-paragraph">Which Pokemon that can appear in a habitat is affected by the <b class="a-bold">current weather and the time of day</b>. This means that different Pokemon may appear during the day or at night, or when it is sunny or rainy.</p>

<p class="a-paragraph">Some Pokemon are also less likely to appear due to their <b class="a-bold">rarity</b>, so make sure to create various habitats around the map!</p>

<p class="a-paragraph">All of these information can be checked from the Pokedex and the Habitat Dex.</p>
<h3 class="a-header--3" id="hm_5">Pokemon Befriended Can be Moved to a House</h3>
<p class="a-paragraph"><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Moving a Pokemon to a House" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4423995/3b0f20c656a09a27277dbfa02de240a5.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(px*410/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*410/728);"></p>

<p class="a-paragraph">Once you have built a <b class="a-bold">house</b>, which is any structure that has four walls and a door, you can fill up the space with at least three pieces of furniture to make it a fully-fledged house.</p>

<p class="a-paragraph">Once decorated, you can then bring a Pokemon with you, enter the building, and <b class="a-bold">ask them to move</b> into the house.</p>
<h2 class="a-header--2" id="hl_4">Habitats Overview</h2><h3 class="a-header--3" id="hm_6">A Place Where Pokemon Can Reside</h3>
<p class="a-paragraph"><img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" class="a-img lazy lazy-non-square" alt="Habitats Overview" data-src="https://img.game8.co/4423636/1d07d14588b7f5f99cd2f44fa73f054d.png/show" width="728" style="height: 0; padding-bottom: calc(px*410/728); padding-bottom: calc(min(100%,728px)*410/728);"></p>

<p class="a-paragraph"><b class="a-bold">Habitats</b> are areas where Pokemon that you meet in the game reside. As you explore and revitalize the land, you will create and restore Habitats around the map. Wild Pokemon can then appear and befriend you, and they will call their respective Habitats home!</p>
